content.query:
--Create view Calender

CREATE VIEW  gold.Calender
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1

--Create View Customers

CREATE VIEW gold.Customers
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Customers/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;
